shows.title: Kamisama Kiss
shows.description: Nanami was just a normal high school girl down on her luck until a stranger’s lips marked her as the new Land God and turned her world upside down. Now, she’s figuring out the duties of a deity with the help of Tomoe, a reformed fox demon who reluctantly becomes her familiar in a contract sealed with a kiss. The new responsibilities—and boys—are a lot to handle, like the crow demon masquerading as a gorgeous pop idol and the adorable snake spirit who’s chosen the newly minted god to be his bride. As the headstrong Tomoe tries to whip her into shape, Nanami finds that love just might have cute, pointed fox ears. With romance in the air, will the human deity be able to prove herself worthy of her new title?

episodes.epDesc: Abandoned by her father, Nanami finds herself homeless when she meets a man who offers his own home to her. His home turns out to be a shrine where his supernatural household awaits the return of their lord and master after a 20-year absence.

Nanami discovers that Kurama, a famous pop star, has transferred to her high school, which spurs her to return to school. However, as a weak land god, her life may be at risk if she wanders outside the shrine alone.

The land under Mikage Shrine's protection includes Isara Swamp and Himemiko, its guardian mistress, comes to pay her respects to the new land god. And Nanami's divine matchmaking powers are put to the test for the first time.
Nanami saves a pretty white snake at school and for her trouble, she becomes marked as the snake's intended. Tomoe transfers into Nanami's class to protect her, but the snake comes for her anyway.

Narukami, god of thunder, has always wanted Tomoe as a familiar for herself. Now that the god he serves is Nanami, a human girl, Narukami sees her chance to take away Nanami's godhood and make Tomoe hers.
Nanami stays home with a cold while Tomoe goes to school disguised as her in order to keep her attendance rate from slipping. Mizuki takes advantage of Tomoe's absence to pay Nanami a visit.

episodes.epTitle: The God Asks a Boy Out on a Date
episodes.epDesc: Nanami experiments a little with her divine powers while she struggles to define exactly how she feels about Tomoe. And Kurama, being the yokai who has more experience with humans, offers some words of advice to Tomoe.

episodes.epTitle: The God Goes to the Beach
episodes.epDesc: Summer break is here and Nanami goes to the beach with her friends to take her mind off her broken heart. Trouble ensues when Tomoe accompanies her and goes into the ocean against his better judgment.

episodes.epTitle: The God Goes to the Dragon King's Palace
episodes.epDesc: In her quest to recover the stolen Dragon King's right eye and return it to him in exchange for Tomoe's freedom, Nanami travels back in time and gets a glimpse of Tomoe's past.

episodes.epTitle: Tomoe Becomes a Familiar / The God Goes to a Mixer
episodes.epDesc: Flashing back to the past, some of what Tomoe went through with Mikage is revealed. And returning to the present for the second part, Nanami gets dragged off to a mixer with her friends.
Mizuki ventures into the city alone to learn the secret to making it in human society like the super popular pop star Kurama. And Nanami drags Tomoe off on a date to the amusement park.

Nanami decides to hold an autumn festival at the shrine to let the locals know that it's not abandoned or haunted. But as she prepares for the festival, Otohiko comes along to throw a wrench into things.

episodes.epTitle: I've Started the 'Being a God' Thing
episodes.epDesc: Unable to exorcise the miasma encroaching on the shrine, Nanami believes she is useless and leaves. Finding her gone, Tomoe and Mizuki go searching for her, leaving the shrine and the miasma to Onikiri and Kotetsu.

episodes.epTitle: I've Started the 'Being a God' Thing Again
episodes.epDesc: As the land god of the Mikage Shrine, Nanami is invited to the annual gathering of the gods in Izumo, but on the one condition that she must pass a test administered by Otohiko.

Now that Nanami is set to go to Izumo to attend the Divine Assembly, she must decide who goes with her - Tomoe or Mizuki. And she must also face the consequences of attending a divine event as a mortal being.

episodes.epTitle: The God Falls Into the Netherworld
episodes.epDesc: Okuninushi, the god hosting the Divine Assembly, asks Nanami to go handle a situation happening on the border between the worlds of the living and the dead.

episodes.epTitle: The God Races Across the Netherworlds
episodes.epDesc: Izanami imprisons Kirihito and refuses to allow Nanami to return to the surface with him. Nanami must decide how much she believes in her own powers and what she is willing to risk to save him.

episodes.epTitle: The God Makes Her Second Romantic Confession
episodes.epDesc: When Tomoe reverted to being a wild fox to save Nanami, he undid his contract as her familiar. And now, he takes this opportunity to reconsider whether he wants to go back to Nanami or not.
On her way home, Nanami runs into Himemiko and they spend some quality girl time together. Later, she meets a little tengu on a mission.

episodes.epTitle: The God Goes to Mount Kurama
episodes.epDesc: Kurama returns to Mount Kurama with Nanami and Tomoe to take Botanmaru home and see if he can help his ailing father.
Kurama's father is sick, but there is no easy way to get in to see him, so the gang must devise a way to get past Jiro's defenses.

The ruse is simple. Nanami confers her godly powers to Kurama, so he can pretend to be a god, someone Jiro cannot turn away from the gates. While Kurama and Tomoe distract Jiro, Nanami sneaks in to deliver the cure.

episodes.epTitle: The God Receives a Romantic Confession
episodes.epDesc: The search for the Sojobo's soul leads to an unexpected place and an unexpected confession.

episodes.epTitle: The God Goes Back to Being a Child
episodes.epDesc: Kirihito, aka Akura-oh, has not given up on getting his body back from the Netherworld. But in the meantime, Nanami and her familiars go to see the Year God, to receive a talisman for the new year.

episodes.epTitle: The God Recieves a Marriage Proposal
episodes.epDesc: Tomoe gets some insight into Nanami's childhood. And they finally get through the torii gates to see the Year God.

shows.title: Tamon's B-Side
shows.description: Utage Kinoshita is a high school girl who works part-time as a housekeeper. She has devoted her life to her favorite idol, Tamon Fukuhara, from the group F/ACE. Then one day, Utage ends up being assigned to Tamon’s house! There she discovers that off-stage, he is nothing like his wild idol persona. A gloomy, introverted boy with no self-confidence, Utage still finds herself falling for him anyway.

episodes.epTitle: You Need Money to Support Your Oshi
episodes.epDesc: Utage is a huge fan of Tamon from F/ACE and one day, her work leads her to an unexpected meeting.
Utage goes to F/ACE's handshaking event but something unexpected happens.

episodes.epTitle: You're One of Those Insane Fans
episodes.epDesc: After dropping her F/ACE fan, Utage heads to Tamon's place and finds an unexpected visitor.
Tamon asks Utage to go to a summer festival with him so he can find true love.
The competition to decide who will be the new center of F/ACE finally comes to an end.
Tamon is feeling sad after being replaced as center but also wants to show Utage how much he appreciates her.
Utage tries to enjoy a day off to do Tamon fan activities but randomly bumps into the actual Tamon.
Utage is hired as a production assistant when F/ACE has a video shoot at the beach.

episodes.epTitle: I'm the One Who's Gonna Win
episodes.epDesc: Utage tries to get her summer vacation homework done as Ouri tries to get her to look his way.
Utage finds out her new teacher is also a F/ACE fan and she also runs into Natsuki in the wild.

episodes.epTitle: Is It Really Okay For Me to Be Here
episodes.epDesc: Tamon and Utage learn about Natsuki and Asuka's past.

shows.title: Journal with Witch
shows.description: Reclusive novelist Makio Koudai has always preferred the company of books—but when her sister and brother-in-law pass away, Makio unexpectedly becomes the guardian of her 15-year-old niece, Asa Takumi. As they navigate grief, clashing personalities, and the challenges of living together, the two slowly open their hearts to each other, discovering warmth, understanding, and the meaning of family.

episodes.epDesc: When 15-year-old Asa loses her parents to an accident, she's taken in by her strange aunt, Makio.
Makio's friend visits to meet Asa. Later, Makio meets with an old acquaintance for some advice.
Makio and Asa return home to sort through her family's belongings, and Asa attends middle school graduation.
Asa begins high school as Makio grapples with the new responsibilities of being her guardian.
Asa struggles to choose an extracurricular activity as she recalls old memories of Minori.
As Asa enters summer break, Makio finds herself growing closer with Kasamachi-kun.
As Makio weighs what to do with Minori's journal, she meets Emiri's mother and learns of Minori's past.
After discovering Minori's journal, Asa begins skipping school, prompting Makio to search for her.
Asa returns to school and tries her hand at writing lyrics, while Makio battles writer’s block.
Asa continues working on original lyrics while her classmates face struggles of their own at school.
With Valentine's Day approaching and no Valentine, Asa asks others about their plans in hopes of chocolate.

shows.title: Hana-Kimi
shows.description: Mizuki Ashiya is on a mission: disguise herself as a boy and enroll in a male boarding school to meet her idol, high jump star Izumi Sano. But after successfully infiltrating the school, she discovers he’s suddenly quit the sport! Now Mizuki must dodge suspicion, protect her cover, and somehow reach the boy she came all this way for—all while surviving the chaos of an all-boys dorm!

episodes.epDesc: Ashiya Mizuki is a girl but she attends an all-boys school because high jumper Sano Izumi is there.

episodes.epTitle: I Want to Be with You
episodes.epDesc: The school doctor Umeda and Sano figure out that Mizuki is a girl. Can she continue staying at the school?
After Sano stops his friend Rika from slapping Mizuki and yells at Rika, Mizuki and Sano get into a fight.
Sano decides to rejoin the track team, but then his old rival Kagurazaka shows up to provoke him.
Sano doesn't seem to remember the last night, but Mizuki also has other troubles: someone has it out for her.
Mizuki's brother Shizuki unexpectedly comes to Japan. Can she keep keep her secret while he's here?
Dorm 2 is being renovated, so Mizuki needs a place to stay for 2 weeks. Desperate, she turns to Umeda...

episodes.epTitle: It's Not Like We Could Become Lovers
episodes.epDesc: Tamami is all over Sano, putting Mizuki into a strange mood about her and Sano's relationship.
Io asks Mizuki if she wants things with Sano to stay this way. Later, Mizuki is in danger!

episodes.epTitle: I Don't Look Good in Women's Clothes
episodes.epDesc: It's festival time for Osaka High. The winning dorms gets special privileges, so things get heated.
Dorm 1 plays dirty in the chicken fight against Mizuki's team. Later Nanba has a heated exchange with a woman.

shows.title: Lovely★Complex
shows.description: Love is unusual for Koizumi Risa and Ootani Atsushi, who are both striving to find their ideal partner in high school—172 cm tall Koizumi is much taller than the average girl, and Ootani is much shorter than the average guy at 156 cm.

episodes.epTitle: Freshman Year Summer! I'll Definitely Find a Boyfriend!
episodes.epDesc: Risa and Otani decide to help each other to get Suzuki and Chiharu to like them.
Risa and Otani make a bet as to who can get a partner first. Otani runs into his ex-girlfriend. Risa tries to meet new guys in the hopes of finding the one.

episodes.epTitle: A Guy You Like, or a Guy from the Past?
episodes.epDesc: Risa runs into her childhood friend, Haruka. Otani's ex-girlfriend tells her a special secret. Risa prepares a chocolate cake for Otani on Valentine's day.
On the first day of a new academic year at their school, Risa and Otani meet a cute girl, who has recently joined their school and has a crush on Otani.
Otani and Seiko start dating. Risa is uncomfortable with this but doesn't say anything. Some new information comes out about Seiko.

episodes.epTitle: A Maiden's Determination! Love-Love Confession Plan!!
episodes.epDesc: Risa acknowledges her feelings for Otani. Their friends try to help Risa confess her thoughts to him.
It's the school festival and Otani is furious that no one is telling him the name of the guy who Risa likes. Risa is depressed that Otani doesn't understand her feelings.
Risa feels very embarrassed after what happened at the school festival. She tries to avoid Otani at all moments. The class goes for a trip.

Risa tries to give up her feelings for Otani as he doesn't reciprocate the same. Both of them take a trip to the favourite holiday destination of their favourite rapper, Umibouzo, and Risa learns a lesson or two about relationships.

episodes.epTitle: A Confrontation With The Ex-Girlfriend?! The Epic Breast-Baring Battle!!
episodes.epDesc: Risa and Otani go to a party organised by Otani's middle school friends. Risa finds out some interesting details about the relationship between Otani and his ex-girlfriend.

episodes.epTitle: Absolute Death! Revived Love with the Ex-Girlfriend?!
episodes.epDesc: Risa comes to know that Otani's ex-girlfriend has broken up with her current boyfriend and may want to get back together with Otani. She tries her best to make sure that they don't talk to each other.

episodes.epTitle: Recapture Love! Improve as a Girl with Honmei Chocolate!!
episodes.epDesc: Risa decides to give chocolates to Otani on Valentine's day. Everyone in their class comes to know about how Otani rejected Risa. Otani is confused about his feelings for Risa.

episodes.epTitle: Heating Up! A First Kiss in His Room?
episodes.epDesc: Otani books tickets for an Umibouzo concert for Risa and himself. He falls sick one day before the concert. Risa's friends advise her to go and meet Otani, where she comes across his family.
Risa is disheartened when she finds out that Otani doesn't remember anything about their first kiss. There's a new teacher at their school, who is deemed charming by Risa and other girls.
Risa gives up on Otani and forms the Maity club. Maity becomes the substitute basketball coach. Otani detests Maity for a number of reasons.

episodes.epTitle: Maity's Magic! The Transforming Patterns of Love?!
episodes.epDesc: Maity decides to help Risa by making Otani jealous of him.

episodes.epTitle: The Iron Fist of Love! Catch, O Maiden Soul!!
episodes.epDesc: Risa and Otani go back to being a comedy duo. The girls at the school find out that Maity has a fiancee. Otani participates in a basketball competition.
It's Risa's birthday. Haruka and Seiko have planned a party for her. However, Otani doesn't show up.

episodes.epTitle: Sudden Downturn!! The First Date is the Beginning of Disaster
episodes.epDesc: After the events of her birthday, even though Risa cannot caption her relationship with Otani, she's very happy. They go to a game together and run into a potential rival of Risa.

episodes.epTitle: Declaration of War!! The dangerous Beauty Burns with Envy!!
episodes.epDesc: Otani's neighbour, Mimi, who has a crush on Otani, warns Risa to stay away from him. Risa is terrified of her.

episodes.epTitle: Premonition of Separation?! Risa and Otani Walk Seperate Paths
episodes.epDesc: Risa and Otani's other friends come to know about his future plans of going to a university. Everyone is surprised. Nobuko decides to study in a university in another city.
Otani gets busy studying for university entrance exams. Everybody has a goal in mind. Risa feels aimless and starts working part time as a waitress. She meets a fellow Umibouzo fan.

episodes.epTitle: Various Directions!! Everyone Embraces Their Own Circumstances
episodes.epDesc: The boy at Risa's workplace likes her and Otani suspects Risa of an affair. He breaks up with her. Risa tries to explain and apologizes for her mistakes. However, Otani doesn't budge.
Otani comes to stay at Risa's place for the night before his exam and meets her family. After his exam, Otani and Risa run into Mimi, who is a model now. Risa thinks of what she should do in life.

shows.title: Bridgerton
shows.description: Wealth, lust, and betrayal set in the backdrop of Regency era England, seen through the eyes of the powerful Bridgerton family.

episodes.epDesc: Daphne debuts on London's marriage market as a new gossip sheet sets high society atwitter and Simon, the eligible Duke of Hastings, returns to town.
Simon's apparent courtship of Daphne angers her brother Anthony and threatens to ruin the arrangements he made. Marina opens up to a curious Penelope.
After Daphne catches the eye of a royal suitor, she turns to Simon for relationship advice. Lady Featherington tries to browbeat Marina into marriage.
Daphne receives a stunning gift from Prince Friedrich but soon courts scandal at a ball. Eloise searches for clues to Lady Whistledown's identity.
To fend off rumors about their garden escapade, Simon and Daphne must make a personal appeal to the queen. Marina's wedlock scheme dismays Penelope.
On her honeymoon, Daphne discovers just how uninformed she is about the physical aspects of the marital bed. Colin comes to a decision about Marina.
Amid accusations of lies and betrayal, a rift forms between the newlyweds, while a deception of another kind could besmirch the Bridgerton family name.
The duke and duchess's season-ending ball signals a turning point for their marriage — and ushers in changes of fortune and fate to those around them.
Anthony begins his search for a wife, Eloise braves her society debut, and Lady Danbury helps the queen choose a diamond among the season's debutantes.
Facing heated competition and a prickly foe, Anthony steps up his courtship game. Eloise makes a Lady Whistledown discovery as a family member returns.
The Sharmas arrive at the Bridgerton's country estate, where Anthony seeks to win Kate's good opinion amid bad memories and a ruthless game of pall-mall.
As guests gather for the Bridgerton's ball, Anthony and Kate clash during a hunting party, Colin revisits the past, and Lady Featherington sets a trap.
Rattled by Anthony's hasty nuptial plans, Kate receives advice from Lady Danbury. Eloise spars with a new ally. Emotions run high during a dinner party.
Anthony's duty to his family wars with his desire for Kate. Edwina ponders her future — and impresses the queen. Eloise's rendezvous stirs suspicion.
Scandalous rumors swirl around the Bridgertons and the Sharmas. The queen’s ire over Lady Whistledown lands Eloise and Penelope in a quandary.
Anthony lashes out as he awaits news of Kate, while Eloise turns to Theo for help in her Lady Whistledown hunt and Lady Featherington plans a grand ball.
The debutantes enter the marriage mart as Francesca navigates her first season out. A well-traveled bachelor returns, and Penelope unveils a new look.
Facing heated competition and a prickly foe, Anthony steps up his courtship game. Eloise makes a Lady Whistledown discovery as a family member returns.
Penelope catches the eye of nature-loving Lord Debling, to the dismay of other admirers. A near-catastrophe on a windy day makes a hero out of Colin.
When a caller arrives at her home, Penelope faces a difficult choice. For others, opportunities to build a fresh start — and find a love match — abound.
Lady Whistledown's surprising engagement announcement reverberates through the Ton, while Penelope grapples with the need to disclose her true identity.
A desperate impostor strives to publicly win the queen's favor. Penelope races to write an urgent missive — but has the damage already been done?
A shocking column fuels the queen's search for the real Lady Whistledown. As the wedding looms, Penelope questions her future as a wife — and scribe.
With a rival threatening to divulge her secret for money, Penelope chooses the best path forward as her relationships and livelihood hang in the balance.
Despite pressure from the ton, Benedict Bridgerton isn't one to settle down — until a masked woman at a ball unexpectedly captures his heart.
To find his mystery woman, Benedict enlists the help of none other than Lady Whistledown. Lady Danbury's patience with the Queen wears decidedly thin.

episodes.epTitle: The Field Next to the Other Road
episodes.epDesc: An unexpected detour draws Benedict and Sophie closer together. Back in Mayfair, the help gains the upper hand in a heated 'maid war.'
Eager to focus on her new role, Sophie finds her longing for Benedict is hard to shake. Francesca broaches a sensitive topic. Violet hosts tea for two.
A new neighbor shakes up Bridgerton House. Hyacinth and Gregory take their first steps into society. Penelope struggles with the loss of anonymity.
Sophie fears the consequences of an impulsive decision. Benedict comes to terms with a new heir. A lavish ball is upended by a shocking announcement.
The Bridgerton family unites in the wake of a tragedy. Sophie's plans hit a snag. Benedict faces a heartwrenching choice.
With Sophie in peril and the entire family's reputation at stake, the Bridgertons must rely on the ton's most powerful currency: scandal.

shows.title: When Life Gives You Tangerines
shows.description: In Jeju, a spirited girl and a steadfast boy's island story blossoms into a lifelong tale of setbacks and triumphs — proving love endures across time.

episodes.epDesc: Raised by a tenacious mother, a young, bright-eyed Ae-sun has dreams bigger than her village — until an unexpected tragedy changes everything.
As love blossoms between Ae-sun and Gwan-sik, they make their first bold move together. But their romantic adventure hits a snag.
After a dramatic rescue, Ae-sun and Gwan-sik return to Jeju. Soon, Ae-sun resigns herself to a sad fate — leaving Gwan-sik devastated.
Summer brings joy as the newlyweds start a life together, but living with Gwan-sik's family tests their happiness — can they find a path to peace?
As Gwan-sik struggles to find work, Ae-sun worries for her family — until a lifeline appears. Soon after, Ae-sun sets her ambitions higher in Jeju.
Just as Ae-sun and Gwan-sik taste the joys of their new life, a summer storm changes everything — testing their will to carry on.
As the village chief election approaches, Ae-sun faces corrupt opposition. Geum-myeong receives an unusual request that tests her morals.

episodes.epTitle: The Moon Wanes, Yet the Young Heart Remains
episodes.epDesc: When Geum-myeong receives a chance to study in Japan, dreams take flight. Now Ae-sun and Gwan-sik must make a tough decision.

episodes.epTitle: The Wind Goes Whoosh, My Heart Goes Boo-Hoo
episodes.epDesc: Life in a small apartment tests Ae-sun and Gwan-sik as they struggle to parent Yang Eun-myeong. Meanwhile, Geum-myeong juggles love and life in Seoul.

episodes.epTitle: The Storm Sweeps My Heart, the Love Rocks My Heart
episodes.epDesc: While Geum-myeong grows closer to her quirky colleague, Ae-sun's troubling dreams stir real concerns. Do they hold any meaning?
As Geum-myeong's engagement moves toward marriage, her heart fills with doubt — will her first love story find its happy ending like her mother's?
Back in Jeju, Geum-myeong mends her heart in familiar surroundings. Ae-sun treasures sweet moments with her loved ones.
While facing a career setback during an economic downturn, Geum-myeong encounters a familiar face — sparking an unexpected new beginning.
Ae-sun and Gwan-sik grapple with Yang Eun-myeong's misfortune, sacrificing everything they can to help him. But Eun-myeong's self-confidence takes a hit.
Between new business ventures and career changes, the family faces separate hurdles on their paths — drawing strength from their bond to press ahead.

episodes.epTitle: Here's to All You've Been Through
episodes.epDesc: As the Yang family finally enjoys the fruits of their labor, sudden agony strikes — testing their resolve and the strength of their enduring love.
